description: 5 datasets (dbpedia K=14, clinc_oos K=151, banking77 K=77, ag_news K=4, 20newsgroups K=20). For each dataset, use best layer from 5-layer scan (layers 0,6,12,18,23). Fit alpha = slope of logit(q_norm) vs kappa_nearest across 5 datasets. Frozen constants, no post-hoc refit.

frozen_constants.source: 12-architecture LOAO interval, pre-registered before any SmolLM2 tests
